user.title: EKZ – Login
user.description:
Enter your myEKZ credentials. EKZ requires two-factor authentication (2FA) via an authenticator app. You need to provide the **secret key** from your authenticator app setup — not the 6-digit code.

If you haven't set up an authenticator app yet, log in to [my.ekz.ch](https://my.ekz.ch) → Account Security → Signing In and add a new authenticator device. When the QR code is displayed, reveal the secret key (e.g. `JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP`) and enter it below. SMS-based 2FA is **not** supported and must be replaced with an authenticator app.

data_description.totp_secret: The secret key shown when you set up your authenticator app on my.ekz.ch. This is a letter/number string like `JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP` — not the 6-digit code. The integration uses this to generate the login code automatically.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Please check your username and password.
error.totp_required: EKZ requires an authenticator app (TOTP) but no secret key was entered. Enter the TOTP secret key from your authenticator app setup.
error.invalid_totp: The TOTP code was rejected by EKZ. Make sure the secret key is correct and that your system clock is accurate.
error.sms_2fa_not_supported: SMS-based 2FA is not supported. Please switch to an authenticator app at my.ekz.ch → Account Security → Signing In.
error.no_contracts: Login succeeded but no active contracts were found for this account.
error.ekz_maintenance: The myEKZ portal is currently offline for maintenance. Please try again later.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to myEKZ. Please check your network connection and try again.
